mode_of_action_summary: Topramezone inhibits the HPPD enzyme in weeds, blocking carotenoid biosynthesis. This leads to bleaching of leaves, disruption of photosynthesis, and eventual death of susceptible weeds.

active_ingredients.name: Topramezone
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Inhibits HPPD enzyme causing bleaching and death of weeds

pest_behavior.rapid_growth: Weeds compete with crops for nutrients and sunlight
pest_behavior.nutrient_competition: Weeds reduce crop yield by consuming essential nutrients
pest_behavior.spread: Weeds spread quickly if not controlled early

urdu: جڑی بوٹیاں فصل میں پھیل رہی ہیں
پودے کی بڑھوتری متاثر ہو رہی ہے
punjabi: جڑی بوٹیاں فصل وچ پھیل رہیاں نیں
پودے دی وڈھائی متاثر ہو رہی اے

application_details.method: Apply uniformly on actively growing weeds
application_details.coverage: Ensure full coverage of weed foliage

resistance_management.advice: Rotate with herbicides of different modes of action

benefits: Controls both grassy and broadleaf weeds
farmer_benefits: جڑی بوٹیاں جلد ختم ہو جاندیاں نیں

multilingual_description.english: Post-emergence herbicide for effective control of weeds in maize.
multilingual_description.urdu: مکئی میں جڑی بوٹیوں کے کنٹرول کے لیے مؤثر دوا۔
multilingual_description.punjabi: مکئی وچ جڑی بوٹیاں ختم کرن لئی مؤثر سپرے۔

embedding_text: Tony 30 SC herbicide contains topramezone and is used for control of grassy and broadleaf weeds in maize. It works by inhibiting HPPD enzyme causing bleaching and death of weeds.
